findings.description: Inappropriate-communication example (2) is misrendered. Image reads '(2)情報を知らせるべき人に送っていない' (failed to send to people who should be informed). JSON definition says '(2)情報を知らせる人に送ってしまうこと' which loses the negation and 'べき', inverting the meaning. The zh and en translations follow the incorrect jp. Correct jp should be '情報を知らせるべき人に伝えていない（送り忘れ）'.

reviewer_notes: The lesson header, 聖徳太子 10-to-1 communication figure, main term definition, and communication-key-points section are all structurally present and largely accurate. One med-severity jp_surface_wrong issue: inappropriate-communication example (2) is semantically inverted versus the image — the image describes failing to send to the right people, the JSON describes incorrectly sending to someone. This is a meaningful error for exam study content and should be corrected in the next fix pass.
